name: Peppered Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except seasoned pepper.
2. Shape the mixture into a ball.
3. Slightly flatten one side of the ball.
4. Roll the flattened side in seasoned pepper.
5. Wrap the ball in plastic wrap and chill for 6-12 hours until firm.
6. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature with assorted savory crackers, breads, or toasts on the side.
